subject: Free setup for Strasburg Smiles — no catch
body:
Hi,

I'm running a free pilot this month for one dental clinic in Kitchener.

Here's the deal: I set up your entire patient communication system at no cost.
Missed call follow-up, appointment reminders, patient reactivation. Done in 5 days.

You pay nothing upfront. If you recover at least 3 patients in 30 days, I charge
the standard fee. If not, you keep the system and owe me nothing.

I'm reaching out to Strasburg Smiles specifically because Kitchener is one of the markets
I'm expanding into this month and I want one strong local result to build on.

All I need from you: your patient list and 15 minutes on a call.

Interested? clinicflowautomation.com/pilot — or just reply to this email.

Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation
contact@clinicflowautomation.com
438-544-0442

---
To opt out of future emails, reply with 'unsubscribe'.
ClinicFlow Automation · Montreal, QC · Canada
